overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking along a snowy mountain trail at night. The character traverses a narrow path along a cliff edge, navigating through rocky terrain under a dark blue sky, eventually approaching a summit marked by a wooden cross structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail along cliff edge with valley view

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the narrow snowy mountain path with a steep drop visible to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising immediately to the left of the path
narrow snow-covered mountain path winding along the ridge
expansive view of dark mountain valleys with faint distant lights
large rock formation jutting out from the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, snow-covered mountain trail at blue hour. The character walks steadily along a narrow path hugging a steep cliff face on the left, with an expansive view of distant mountain valleys visible to the right. The terrain is rugged and natural, with scattered boulders and rocky outcrops lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain ridge path enclosed by rock formations

events.description: character follows the trail as it curves left around the mountain ridge, valley view disappearing

agents.ego_description: navigating a gradual left turn along the winding mountain ridge, moving away from the cliff edge

entered.detail: jagged rock formations creating a more enclosed corridor along the path

segments.scene_description: As the character rounds a bend in the mountain trail, the expansive valley view disappears behind the terrain. The path becomes more enclosed by rocky ridge formations on the left, creating a narrower corridor. The character continues walking forward, now navigating through a more confined section of the mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit approach with religious monument

events.description: large wooden cross structure becomes visible on the right, marking the mountain summit

agents.ego_description: climbing the final snowy approach toward the summit, heading toward the illuminated cross structure

entered.detail: tall wooden cross silhouetted against the dark blue sky, marking the mountain peak
scattered stone foundations and cairns near the summit

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending toward a mountain summit. The terrain opens up again as the path climbs, revealing a large wooden cross structure silhouetted against the night sky. Stone ruins and cairns appear near the path as the character approaches the peak, with the cross growing larger and more prominent in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that transitions from an expansive cliffside vista to a confined pass and finally to a desolate summit. It begins with the character walking a narrow path hugging a steep cliff face, overlooking a vast valley of distant mountains under the deep blue of twilight. As the character rounds a bend, the open landscape vanishes behind the terrain, shifting the scene into a narrow corridor enclosed by towering rocky ridge formations. The path then begins to climb, opening up once more to reveal stone ruins and cairns scattered across the peak. Finally, the camera follows the ascent toward the summit, where a large wooden cross becomes prominently silhouetted against the dark night sky.
